growth_records.notes: Table 2, 12 h culture. mu_max=0.151±0.004 /h and glucose uptake qS=6.634±0.684 mmol/gDCW/h are experimental (asterisk in table; uptake taken from experiments to constrain FBA per Methods 2.4). Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.693/0.151=4.59 h. Yxs=mu/qS=0.151/6.634=0.0228 gDCW/mmol glucose; per gram=0.0228*1000/180.16=0.126 gDCW/g glucose. Biomass titer 1.010 gDCW/L.
